title: Make It Real Blueprint Review Artifact
description: Schema for blueprint-review.json, the approval evidence that binds a reviewed Blueprint fingerprint to a run packet.

schemaVersion.description: Artifact schema version emitted by the Make It Real planner.

runId.description: Run packet identifier covered by the review.

workItemId.description: Primary work item covered by the review.

prdId.description: PRD identifier covered by the review.

blueprintFingerprint.description: Fingerprint of the approved or pending Blueprint artifact set.

reviewSource.description: Command or review channel that produced this review record.

reviewedBy.description: Reviewer identity, or null before a decision is made.

reviewedAt.description: ISO timestamp for the decision, or null while review is pending.

decisionNote.description: Optional reviewer note explaining the decision or requested revision.
